"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:49 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem818_route_after_bem817.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
results=[]
for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results').glob('*.status.json')) if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results').exists() else []:
    results.append({'path':str(p),'text':read(p)[:800]})
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
queue=[str(p) for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json'))] if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').exists() else []
if rs=='next_process_real_response':
    status='process_response_ready'; next_action='parse real response and produce agreed protocol'
elif rs=='next_parse_dispatch_results' and results:
    status='dispatch_results_ready'; next_action='parse status JSON and patch failure or wait runtime if dispatch_attempted'
elif rs=='next_repair_no_dispatch_results':
    status='no_results_repair_needed'; next_action='processor marker '+str(marker.get('status'))+', queue_count '+str(len(queue))+': patch runner/loop based on these facts'
else:
    status='route_unknown'; next_action='diagnose route '+rs
state={'bem':'BEM-819','status':status,'route_status':rs,'dispatch_results':results[-10:],'marker':marker,'queue_count':len(queue),'queue_tail':queue[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem819_execute_bem818_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem819_execute_bem818_route.md').write_text('# BEM-819 | Execute BEM-818 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem819_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-819'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem819_execute_bem818_route.json','governance/reports/bem819_execute_bem818_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem819_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-818 route with dispatch results, processor marker, and queue facts')
